title: Xtra Silky Japanese Ice Cream Parfait
description: A soothing Japanese dessert featuring silky ice cream and earthy flavors, perfect for a cozy evening treat, with a low-fat friendly twist.
instructions: In a small saucepan, heat the green tea over low heat until it starts to steam.
In a separate bowl, mix together the red bean paste and honey until well combined.
Cut the mochi into small pieces and toast them in a dry pan until lightly browned.
Scoop the matcha ice cream into a tall glass or parfait dish.
Drizzle the green tea over the ice cream, creating a steamy effect.
Top the ice cream with the red bean paste mixture, toasted mochi, and sesame seeds.
Serve immediately and enjoy the silky, earthy flavors.
Garnish with additional sesame seeds and mochi pieces if desired.
